title: Create: Magma to Diamonds
description: Adds a brand new way to curate diamonds
body:
# What this mod adds
Have you ever wanted to automate diamonds, without it feeling too cheaty or too slow? well, Magma to Diamonds might be for you!
- Adds Cracked Basalt, Made from freezing Magma
- Adds Basalt Pebble, made from crushing Cracked Basalt
- Adds recipes from sequenced assembly from cobble to magma, and blasting basalt pebbles into coal.

## Dependencies and Compatabilities
This mod needs:
- Create, obviously
- Create: Dreams and Desires, For bulk freezing and diamond shards, essential for making this mod work

Mods which complement this are:
- Storage Drawers
- Create:Connected
- JEI
- Jade

### Have Fun!
If you decide to download this mod, from the deepest pit of my heart I thank you, and have fun using the Magma to Diamonds mod!
